name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: This nonsense in D.C. is exactly why we have to flip the House.
body:
Districts like ours are the key. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523881?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b6a8f9962f&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=39243d8870&e=90fad69796)
---
| | Peter, I'm sick of this impeachment sham in Washington.

I'm sick of Congressional Democrats' constant attempts to overturn the results of the 2016 election and the will of the American people.

It highlights how important it is that we flip the House in 2020 and send Nancy Pelosi and her crew of impeachment-first, not America-First, Democrats packing.

Every moment they spend on this nonsense is a moment they're not delivering on the issues the American people are clamoring for, from securing the border to restraining the overwhelming debt.

[**We need your help to send them a message that we are sick and tired of their Swamp games. Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 today so we can flip this district and the whole House red in 2020?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=c60ec1c282&e=90fad69796)
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=7b2ebd6527&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

[**Please consider donating $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 so that we can flip IA-02 and get the impeachment-first Democrats out of power.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=5c7cb81a2e&e=90fad69796)

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: Progress update on our $1.5 million goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, Since Cory took the stage Wednesday night, our campaign has seen strong momentum. We had our _**first and second-best online fundraising days**_ of the entire campaign on November 20th and 21st, plus we received donations from all fifty states including D.C. and Puerto Rico within _minutes_ of Cory leaving the stage. **And, in case you missed it, we received donations from so many people chipping in for the very first time that we surpassed the DNC 's donor threshold to qualify for the December debate!** We wanted to build on the momentum, so we set a goal to raise $1.5 million by the end of the month. **Our team 's latest update has us at a little over $900,000 with just seven days to go.** **We still need to raise about $600,000 to reach our $1.5 million goal. Will you chip in to help us do it before the clock runs out at 11:59 p.m. on November 30th?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191123_BHQ_20191123-fr-BHQ-progress-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

name: Bennet for America
subject: Urgent: race update >>>>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

In a week we'll be closing the books on November. We have an ambitious fundraising goal: $1OO,OOO.

With a record number of undecided voters, it's crucial that we have the funds needed to run more ads and expand our field operations, but right now, we're being outspent.

[We've made good progress toward our goal since our announcement yesterday, but we still have a long way to go!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9e7/134673f2/9b0a442/6997af64/535628807/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_112319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Will you rush a donation to keep up our momentum? Our average online gift has been $29 but any amount you chip in will help us reach undecided voters!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba9e7/134673f2/9b0a442/6997af64/535628807/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_112319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3526%2E377263%2ENG48G0) Yang Gang --

If we don’t hit our goal by November 30th, here’s what will happen:
* We can’t keep our TV ads up in key states.
* We can’t invest in more digital ads and raise Andrew’s name ID.
* And we can’t compete with the other candidates that have long lists of wealthy donors.

But with your help, we can hit our end-of-month goal and put ourselves in a good position to change the dynamics of this race. [Can you make a contribution of $10 now when it matters most? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Mangone For Congress
body:
I know it’s Sunday...
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12181954/125010957/-818771882?refcode=header-img&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=f9662d94-d60e-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTY2MmQ5NC1kNjBlLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVQylGuQwlrPgghIW10FLd9JtjXxLhwMAUlID8r7f5Q=)

name: Taylor, Team MJ Hegar
subject: NEWS ALERT: Hegar leads the field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator Cornyn is vulnerable, and MJ Hegar is in the best position to beat him...

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b4/7f51f7bc/4b8f51f1/4ef09cf7/4009697856/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **"Hegar, an Air Force veteran, leads the field"**
of Senator Cornyn's opponents.
\-- _Texas Tribune_
**[Donate now to help build a campaign that can WIN in Texas>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b4/7f51f7bc/4b8f51f1/4ef09cf6/4009697856/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191124.1nd__545__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

Hey Peter,

Taylor here -- MJ's Texas Finance Director. We're working around the clock to hit our $20,000 goal before Thanksgiving. **[Can you donate right now and help us get there?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b4/7f51f7bc/4b8f51f1/4ef09cf6/4009697856/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191124.1nd__545__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator John Cornyn is vulnerable: After nearly 20 years in office, barely 1⁄3 of Texans support him. That's because he's been too busy serving the special interests, from Big Pharma to the NRA, to pay attention to Texas.

MJ flew combat search and rescue missions in Afghanistan, survived enemy fire from the Taliban, and took on the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women -- she's a true fighter with **the best chance to finally send Sen. Cornyn home once and for all. [Can you donate right now to help us reach our goal and stay on track to send Sen. Cornyn packing?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b4/7f51f7bc/4b8f51f1/4ef09cf6/4009697856/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191124.1nd__545__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ _can_ beat Sen. Cornyn, but this is a two-stage campaign, and before we can get out the vote and let people know how he has failed Texas, we need to prove to everyone that MJ is the best candidate to do it. **[We need you on board.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b4/7f51f7bc/4b8f51f1/4ef09cf6/4009697856/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191124.1nd__545__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Your donations fuel our campaign, and your support keeps us energized during our long days on the campaign trail.

We're so grateful that you're on our team.

Cheers,
Taylor

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b4/7f51f7bc/4b8f51f1/4ef09cf6/4009697856/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=email_20191124.1nd__545__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: It's going to take all hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Yesterday, Cory wrote to you about our end-of-month fundraising goal. **We have to raise $1.5 million by 11:59 p.m. on November 30th.** It's going to take all hands on deck to hit an ambitious goal like this one. If you're still fired up about Cory's incredible performance on the debate stage this week, consider chipping in. **Here 's a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-eombump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for being on this team,
Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ _We 're setting a big end-of-month goal of $1.5 million, and we won't hit it without your help. Read about our new goal below and then, **[please consider chipping in a few dollars to help us get there.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-eombump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_ Friend, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to donate to my campaign. I know we reach out for your support often -- and trust me, we know that you can't give every single time we ask. But, we have a huge goal to hit in the next week -- and I don't think we'll get there without your help. As I write to you, I'm still in awe of what we accomplished in these past few days. As soon as I walked backstage from Wednesday night's debate, my team told me that donations were coming in at a record pace. It wasn't long before we would receive donations from all 50 states as well as D.C. and Puerto Rico. That's not all: **We raised more money online in that _first hour_ after I had left the stage than we had raised in our _best online fundraising day of the entire campaign._** Since then, we officially reached the DNC donor threshold with over 200,000 individual donors for the December debate -- a truly amazing accomplishment for an underdog campaign like ours. I'm so thankful to this team for helping hit this milestone. At a critical moment in our campaign, tens of thousands of people stepped up -- many of whom donated for the very first time. When we looked at the numbers yesterday morning, it turns out we had raised $770,000 in the span of just two days! **Now, I want to see if we can make it all the way to one-and-a-half million dollars before we close the books on this month. That 's right. $1,500,000 by 11:59 p.m. on Sunday, November 30th.** It won't be easy. November can be a very difficult month for fundraising. But after this week, I have all the faith in the world that this team can pull together to reach this ambitious goal. And in the spirit of radical transparency, we'll be keeping you updated on our progress along the way. **[Are you with me? Donate $5 today to help us hit our big $1.5 million goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-eombump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We are moving full speed ahead and bringing in the resources we'll need to take this campaign across the finish line. If we've proven anything this week, it's that our underdog campaign has a lot of fight left in it. Now let's go do something incredible. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-eombump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df7/5fca0d19/79411d17/291c559b/295461996/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df7/5fca0d19/79411d17/291c559a/295461996/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df7/5fca0d19/79411d17/291c5599/295461996/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df7/5fca0d19/79411d17/291c5598/295461996/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df7/5fca0d19/79411d17/291c55e7/295461996/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df7/5fca0d19/79411d17/291c559b/295461996/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Trump's grudges hurt our nation's most vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390944/55b66746/2ca4a360/80f1c53/2816618101/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | For decades, California's ambitious car emissions rules have set the standard for the nation, driving innovations in fuel efficiency and pushing the auto industry to offer vehicles with lower carbon emissions nationwide. _Until now._ This fall, Donald Trump revoked California's right to set rules on air quality, threatening to undo the progress we've made and actually _accelerate _the climate crisis. **[Add your name to tell Donald Trump, "Absolutely not. Get your hands off California's emissions standards."](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390944/55b66746/2ca4a360/80f1c5c/2816618101/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-11-emissions-standards-email")** Trump's attacks will hurt us all, but the effects will be especially brutal in communities - disproportionately poor communities, immigrant communities, and communities of color - where highways and commercial warehouses mean thousands of cars and trucks passing through each day. And while that's unconscionable, what makes this truly grotesque is that Trump is acting solely out of spite. He's pushing his personal vendetta against California, and against Barack Obama. **Millions of people, already struggling in a system that's rigged against them, along with their families and neighbors, face increased risks of chronic disease - because the President of the United States wants to punish people who hurt his feelings.** We're stepping up to fight back - against both Trump's dangerous, petty impulses and the system that pushes their consequences onto our most vulnerable communities. We've got our work cut out for us, and we're not letting up. **[stand with us to demand Trump leave auto emissions standards alone.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390944/55b66746/2ca4a360/80f1c5c/2816618101/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/emissions-standards/kennedy/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-11-emissions-standards-email")** **** |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390944/55b66746/2ca4a360/80f1c5d/2816618101/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? [**Switch to our less email option here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390944/55b66746/2ca4a360/80f1c5e/2816618101/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). [**Contact us here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390944/55b66746/2ca4a360/80f1c58/2816618101/VEsB/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/contact/"). |

Friend,

My campaign is facing a make or break moment and I’ll be blunt, I’m starting to feel the pressure. **[In less than one week, I will be facing a major fundraising deadline and if I can’t raise $15,000 before time runs out –](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=74c2f9031b8844b6bb50a8d42e85d79c&_e=ImfqOUmoWSwPfFM2ayREOY3k2iDA7uK_pAWyM9il8Ze2N8E5Jc827d9ZjMxiHRduRzeK3oZICmS_7quX5QZOBYNJadG7gFxocEyYvAESRpwmqiInOmWkLqVkgeLAwP-ZDqFmMJczglVMbX-7h8bRZwmA96qydmc8DRe2HI-CX45OyEBnFiWmwxNr6NeWyhy64hgMAWC13fWXR5DSycl0M5HXqaSStjc2wcvRCyNgK69j-t5DpAj8aw5EcvFYrp-7z6BQC5tkUoEHXJwzZS4oKmu6UObv2JjHrm-nFCrL8nLbyclM2jJpBLGZSJ0E1hbeV75TJDJ7y37n2aFafZxOiIVSmO2pCk37g9J3ogVX30JyJSfRsRN4OAjT5hH2h93zf2n3BY6Jho5a6ttWvm2qRA%3D%3D)** this might be the end of my campaign.

_I am pleading with you_ , don’t let that happen. **[Friend, would you chip in $25 or more today to keep my campaign alive into December?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=74c2f9031b8844b6bb50a8d42e85d79c&_e=ImfqOUmoWSwPfFM2ayREOY3k2iDA7uK_pAWyM9il8Ze2N8E5Jc827d9ZjMxiHRduRzeK3oZICmS_7quX5QZOBYNJadG7gFxocEyYvAESRpwmqiInOmWkLqVkgeLAwP-ZDqFmMJczglVMbX-7h8bRZwmA96qydmc8DRe2HI-CX47DNGpI9ioEWx-O0sz-9yrlF317wWayGr_o2gb4lutAgNBAO7IFNGH0FBdNotf061zuC3Lja5fUS1xMUy6IqQGbaa7i3OhaXzcD3Wc1dMWh9Hqt36pkY7W7DQm7Jvbv83wxdSUlv4VtPVlGRZRk5q_g46OQ9mNrQO_SUdtDGHbv7itW5_W-bQd-TvdY_AG3nGkN0q1Miw52RU2hEB_QL6iijcS0KnBnJHZrG9O4IHmn2Q%3D%3D)**
| [**Contribute ⇨**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=74c2f9031b8844b6bb50a8d42e85d79c&_e=ImfqOUmoWSwPfFM2ayREOY3k2iDA7uK_pAWyM9il8Ze2N8E5Jc827d9ZjMxiHRduRzeK3oZICmS_7quX5QZOBYNJadG7gFxocEyYvAESRpwmqiInOmWkLqVkgeLAwP-ZDqFmMJczglVMbX-7h8bRZwmA96qydmc8DRe2HI-CX45OyEBnFiWmwxNr6NeWyhy6wlY3gq0kfS4xkAM7EfobW6wRhu8ixKP5medOor277Ts9GRVaU5ADDM3BVznWWy8Efl0GjshM63seegHbJ1258wa5BrzzCoocL8fiHRpr2megu6rIZ-MtPaQivPk86QiXHEAkqHIED12elvqbfsvYp-TieqcMrOnOg3PpK26MxjBivQJfj4cFwhEZWzJKlH3N_8RSQ_ENQsQdKNr-LkcQcQ%3D%3D)

Since announcing my campaign to be re-elected Sheriff of Maricopa County – I have been relentlessly attacked by the liberal media and DC establishment. They want to keep me OUT of office because they know my **tough-as-nails** attitude is **exactly** what our country needs.

But you know me, I will never cower to the Radical Left or stop talking about the issues facing this country – the stakes are too high!

**[Friend, I still need to raise $15,000 before the end of the month. Can I count on having your support?](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=74c2f9031b8844b6bb50a8d42e85d79c&_e=ImfqOUmoWSwPfFM2ayREOY3k2iDA7uK_pAWyM9il8Ze2N8E5Jc827d9ZjMxiHRduRzeK3oZICmS_7quX5QZOBYNJadG7gFxocEyYvAESRpwmqiInOmWkLqVkgeLAwP-ZDqFmMJczglVMbX-7h8bRZwmA96qydmc8DRe2HI-CX45OyEBnFiWmwxNr6NeWyhy6WTYxCos1UtsFTqgL6aG7v4nTy74hXN-1Kj6ZzDUHseBPD-Oh8Zfnjdzx0r392on9CrptAInMeWcaesXBNNY6NLDW991ETbzRU2QvRS7A8dkUBnEXfP5YS--5x6iht1HTLVnWkKPnAncLP8YlaEQv65eyBq_fotCLxDbIAkzl4lZM1eeGj1V4eLU0UDuwvBoNlcS0hTY7ubcePLa-P8qfjQ%3D%3D)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

body:
|

| | Hi Peter, #MoscowMitchIsNext began trending on Twitter after it became clear that the GOP had lost the Kentucky governor's race, spelling out dark omens for McConnell's re-election bid in 2020. Republicans couldn't hold on to the most powerful statewide seats with Trump's full backing in an R+15 state. Sadly, we know Mitch doesn't listen to the will of voters or even care what they think \-- he only cares about continuing his reign of hypocrisy and conservative stonewalling in the Senate. We need to know what Democrats think of him so we can create the best strategy to get rid of him in 2020: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3a/6e9863e8/16b447d3/1db0aa94/1807882626/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/0LaYPdfl") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3a/6e9863e8/16b447d3/1db0aa94/1807882626/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/0LaYPdfl") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3a/6e9863e8/16b447d3/1db0aa9b/1807882626/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191124a.ND-b&refcode2=TgWoXzl6a1UygTsduOm1")

body:

| | I can hardly believe my eyes. \- Mitch McConnell is now in danger of losing his seat \- Democrats have completely erased his lead in the polls \- And Fox News just admitted his favorability is the worst in the entire Senate I say this with absolute certainty: **This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to finally remove McConnell from office --_and take back the entire Senate._** But Democrats' chances drop to zero if we lose my Senate race here in New Mexico. That's why keeping my ads running is so critical. I'm 94 gifts short. name: Team Yang
subject: We need 80 people in Pennsylvania to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This is our chance to win in the crucial early states. Help us hit one of our most ambitious goals yet and rush a contribution today:

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA) Yang Gang --

We’re at a pivotal moment in this campaign, and every time people watch and hear Andrew, his favorability goes up.

In fact, it went up 4.6 points following the debate this past Wednesday.

But the media continues to ignore us. They aren’t going to give us the air time, so we need to keep Andrew on air through the new year. **[Rush a contribution of $10 now to keep Andrew on the air. We need you to be one of 80 people in Pennsylvania to stay on track toward our goal.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=5&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)**

That’s why we’ve set a new public goal for this team -- **$2 million by November 30th at 11:59pm ET.**

Hitting this goal will be the difference between making it to Super Tuesday or falling behind.

$2 million is an ambitious goal, and not many campaigns would try it -- but we know the power of the Yang Gang and we’re counting on you to be the difference.

**[We need you to be one of 80 people in Pennsylvania that steps up and makes a contribution of $10 or more to our campaign today. Please pitch in now:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=13&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=7&amount=25&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---
Together, we are building a campaign that is breaking the mold at every turn. It’s why we’re making this goal public and showing the world whether we hit it -- or fall short.

**This is our chance to win in the crucial early states. Help us hit one of our most ambitious goals yet. Be one of the 80 people we need today in Pennsylvania to donate:[https://act.yang2020.com/go/end-of-november-goal](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ay-email-november?refcode=email-20191124AM-b)**

Let’s do this,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/17704?t=6&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3528%2E377263%2EwcXMZA) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: MJ Hegar
subject: before the holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I couldn't be more excited to eat some great food and spend some quality time with the family this week. But before I can relax, I need to make sure we hit this goal.

---
| | Hi Peter -- I couldn't be more excited to eat some great food and spend quality time with my family this week. But before I can relax for the holiday, I need to ask you one last time to **[pitch in and help us hit our $20,000 Pre-Thanksgiving Goal.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648909b0/7f51f7bc/4b81fbec/4ef09cde/2176765351/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-prethanksgiving?refcode=20191124.2nd__555__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thank you, and have a happy Thanksgiving!

\-- MJ

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Demand Congress stop foreign election interference.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Russia interfered in our 2016 elections. Point blank. The White House and the GOP can lie all they want, but the evidence is staggering. We even saw the president invite more countries to interfere with the 2020 election when he thought it would get him out of trouble for attempting to extort the same from Ukraine. The evidence is also staggering that they, and many other countries, will do the exact same thing in 2020 if we don't work to stop them. That's why we need Congress to do its job and pass the SHIELD Act. This bill would increase transparency around campaign contacts with foreign governments and increase security for our elections. [**This bill passed in the House in October and has laid dormant in the Senate ever since. If you agree with us and think our elections need more protection, add your name to ours and call on the Senate to pass the SHIELD Act NOW.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf1/6e9863e8/16b1ae4d/1db0aa98/3053455199/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/stop-foreign-powers/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for adding your voice. It's critical for voters like you to speak up. name: Sasha
subject: Have you seen Gary's email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hey, friends - Gary is hoping to get another 24 folks to sign our petition from Cresco, and we're missing your name.
Education is particularly important for Gary. His father, Herb, was an English teacher for 32 years. It's part of why Gary's speaking out against Betsy DeVos and Donald Trump.
**[Please, we're closing our petition soon: Will you add your name to tell the Trump Administration that Americans deserve an education secretary who will put students first?](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgp-devos%3Fcode%3Djtk142-ja-nd")**

- Sasha Greer
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gary Peters
Date: Sat, Nov 02, 2019
Subject: three years of Betsy DeVos
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa97/5721a3ed/71c92d52/efa99c9/218453360/VEsE/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa97/5721a3ed/71c92d52/efa99c9/218453360/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
Friends,
It seems fairly straightforward that a secretary of education should put students first. But nearly three years into Betsy DeVos' tenure, she continues to put the interests of corporations ahead of our nation's students.
Just last week, a judge fined Secretary DeVos and her Department of Education $100,000 for violating a court order that she cease collecting on borrowers of student loans for a now-defunct for-profit college.
This isn't the first time Betsy DeVos has let for-profit colleges get away with pulling a fast one on students - and she'll continue her reckless behavior until she is removed as secretary of education. **We can't let her actions go unchecked, and that's why I need your help:**
**[Will you sign my petition declaring the American people deserve a secretary of education who will put our students first? I'm hoping to gather another 275 signatures before midnight, and I'm missing your name:](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgp-devos%3Fcode%3Djtk142-ja-nd")**
| [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgp-devos%3Fcode%3Djtk142-ja-nd")
---
The American people deserve a secretary of education who actually looks after our students. We can't stop speaking out until that happens. Thank you for adding your name.
Gary

[To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa97/5721a3ed/71c92d52/efa99c8/218453360/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN
Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244

Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa97/5721a3ed/71c92d52/efa99c7/218453360/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiImcmVjdXJyaW5nPTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer&recurring=1")

name: Booker HQ
subject: Wanted to make sure you saw this note from Cory:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, We just wanted to make sure you saw this note from Cory. As soon as he stepped off the debate stage on Wednesday night, he expressed how thankful he was to all of the dedicated people who power this campaign. **Take a minute to read his note and then, help us amplify his message across the nation:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-debatebump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Friend, As I leave the DNC debate stage in Atlanta, I'm filled with an enormous sense of gratitude -- for every single one of you who helped get me here. I also feel a responsibility -- to you and the whole team -- to do everything I can to make sure this isn't our last debate. We have a powerful, one-of-a-kind message for our country's future. **A message of love and courageous empathy that we 've seen resonate with voters who, more than anything, want to feel inspired again. [A message that will always drive our campaign.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-debatebump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** But, to be frank: Unless we can hit the DNC's donor and polling thresholds required to qualify for the December debate, tonight might have been the last time you see me up there on a stage like that. **[If, after tonight, you want to make sure I get a chance to be part of the next debate, make a donation today and we'll put it directly to use.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-debatebump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** No matter what, I can't tell you how much your support means to me -- especially in moments like this. Thank you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191124_BHQ_20191124-fr-BHQ-debatebump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df0/5fca0d19/7945a7c5/291c5444/4184209640/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df0/5fca0d19/7945a7c5/291c5443/4184209640/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df0/5fca0d19/7945a7c5/291c5442/4184209640/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df0/5fca0d19/7945a7c5/291c5441/4184209640/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df0/5fca0d19/7945a7c5/291c5440/4184209640/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0df0/5fca0d19/7945a7c5/291c5444/4184209640/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

body:
As Elizabeth has gained traction in the Democratic primary, there's even more urgency. Billionaire Michael Bloomberg's billionaire friend Leon Cooperman literally cried on television a couple of... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b493/45c30650/118581e46/66f6c66d/423665606/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We already have a historically huge and diverse Democratic primary field, but get this:

**If non-billionaires in America were running for the Democratic nomination at the same rate as billionaires are, we 'd have more than 1.5 million candidates.**

What does that tell us? It tells us that the system is so rigged in favor of the ultra-rich that they'd rather try to buy our democracy than see our economy work for everybody.

As Elizabeth has gained traction in the Democratic primary, there's even more urgency. Billionaire Michael Bloomberg's billionaire friend Leon Cooperman literally cried on television a couple of weeks ago while discussing the prospect of a President Warren making billionaires' pay their fair share.

So what's Michael Bloomberg's plan? Spend money to convince the many to keep enriching the few.

He's spending $36 million (and counting!) this week on television ads. We will be outspent, this week -- by a lot.

But what we can do is keep hiring organizers to have real conversations with people about what needs to change in America to expand the middle class -- real conversations between neighbors, friends, and family about how to make our country finally work for everybody.

It's not a billion-dollar business idea -- but it is how we can win, no matter how much he spends.

**[We can fight back, and we can win. Will you chip in $2 to help power the movement that's fighting back against the system that billionaires have rigged for themselves?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b493/45c30650/118581e46/66f6c651/423665606/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFRRl9FR1JfQklMX1BfMjAxOTExMjRfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1QF_EGR_BIL_P_20191124_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Look out: Super Tuesday is only 100 days away. In just 100 days, voters from fourteen states and American Samoa, along with Democrats living abroad, will pick their Democratic candidate for president. More than 40% of the delegates will be decided on this day, **so it will be an exciting and pivotal day for Tom!** Poll after poll shows that Tom’s message is resonating in the early states like South Carolina and Nevada — and we’re seeing that his momentum is growing in the Super Tuesday states too! To keep that energy going, it’s important to get Tom on the December Democratic debate stage, so he can share his ideas with the national audience. **Will you become a grassroots donor by making a $1 contribution to make sure that Tom gets there?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | | Look out: Super Tuesday is only 100 days away. In just 100 days, voters from fourteen states and American Samoa, along with Democrats living abroad, will pick their Democratic candidate for president. More than 40% of the delegates will be decided on this day, so it will be an exciting and pivotal day for Tom! Poll after poll shows that Tom’s message is resonating in the early states like South Carolina and Nevada — and we’re seeing that his momentum is growing in the Super Tuesday states too! To keep that energy going, it’s important to get Tom on the December Democratic debate stage, so he can share his ideas with the national audience. Will you become a grassroots donor by making a $1 contribution to make sure that Tom gets there? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Ever upward, Brandon Brandon Upson National Organizing Director Tom 2020 | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. body:

---
| | As I'm sure you've seen by now, Billionaire Mayor Bloomberg has entered the 2020 Presidential race. [DONATE NOW](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d7/3eb3e2fc/578c46e9/744d4964/4269526607/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+NOW&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all") You know what that means: \- TV airwaves will be flooded with his ads.
\- He pledged to spend $100 million on Facebook alone.
\- Like Trump, the news is going to give him endless free media (not that they need it.) Nonetheless, we have a plan to fight back and win, and you are a critical part of it. [Contribute to our Early State fund, and help us get our message out. All the money in the world can't buy your vote. We win by leaving nobody behind. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d7/3eb3e2fc/578c46e9/744d4963/4269526607/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+to+our+Early+State+fund+and+h&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all") With you,
Julian

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d7/3eb3e2fc/578c46e9/744d496f/4269526607/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d7/3eb3e2fc/578c46e9/744d496e/4269526607/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8d7/3eb3e2fc/578c46e9/744d496d/4269526607/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191124_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Stephen Miller's emails are as awful as you'd think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The White House has had plenty of time to fire Stephen Miller, one of the most vocal and powerful white supremacists in the White House besides Trump, but there he remains \-- despite the Southern Poverty Law Center publishing a trove of his 2015 and 2016 emails to Breitbart editors detailing his white supremacist conspiracy theories: In the wake of Dylann Roof murdering nine black churchgoers in Charleston, Miller emailed about how upset he was that Amazon and other retailers were reacting by ending the sale of Confederate flags from their sites. In another thread, Miller pushed immigration policies based off of the race-based 1920s U.S. immigration laws that Hitler praised in _Mein Kampf_. In yet another thread, Miller recommended they write a story relating current immigration issues to an obscure racist novel popular among neo-Nazis that pushes claims of "white genocide" and depicts Indian immigrants as violent rapists. Reps. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar, along with more than one hundred of their colleagues, have called for him to be fired \-- but unsurprisingly the Trump administration doesn't see anything wrong with being a white nationalist. We couldn't disagree more. We're asking voters today: **Should Stephen Miller be fired?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf3/6e9863e8/16b3d1f6/1db0aae1/755372296/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/py4Mo3oW") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf3/6e9863e8/16b3d1f6/1db0aae1/755372296/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/py4Mo3oW") Thank you for your response. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcf3/6e9863e8/16b3d1f6/1db0aae0/755372296/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191124c.ND-b&refcode2=9iYa7WLOJg6wRXE4if88")

clean_body: | | | Hello Peter, The White House has had plenty of time to fire Stephen Miller, one of the most vocal and powerful white supremacists in the White House besides Trump, but there he remains \-- despite the Southern Poverty Law Center publishing a trove of his 2015 and 2016 emails to Breitbart editors detailing his white supremacist conspiracy theories: In the wake of Dylann Roof murdering nine black churchgoers in Charleston, Miller emailed about how upset he was that Amazon and other retailers were reacting by ending the sale of Confederate flags from their sites. In another thread, Miller pushed immigration policies based off of the race-based 1920s U.S. immigration laws that Hitler praised in Mein Kampf. In yet another thread, Miller recommended they write a story relating current immigration issues to an obscure racist novel popular among neo-Nazis that pushes claims of "white genocide" and depicts Indian immigrants as violent rapists. Reps. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Ilhan Omar, along with more than one hundred of their colleagues, have called for him to be fired \-- but unsurprisingly the Trump administration doesn't see anything wrong with being a white nationalist. We couldn't disagree more. We're asking voters today: Should Stephen Miller be fired? "" "" Thank you for your response. -WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

I support Tom because I’m a new American who believes deeply in the future that Tom envisions — a future free from the corporate stranglehold, where our leaders lift up all people. I’m writing today to share your weekly update from the campaign! ✨ Did you see Tom in the debate spotlight? He discussed some topics critical to folks all across the country — including affordable and sustainable housing, congressional term limits, and voter turnout. Tom also challenged his fellow candidates onstage to commit to taking action on climate and ending corporate corruption in politics. 🌎 Tom knows we can save the world — if we do it together. Even though the climate crisis is the biggest challenge we’ve ever faced, we can take this on, and we can win. If you agree, 🕹 Tom is ready to defeat Donald Trump in 2020, and we have a winning strategy to get there — and to get the progressive change this country needs. The first step is to make sure Tom is on the next debate stage. 🗽 Want to participate in our democracy in a unique, impactful way? Be a Tom Steyer delegate at the Democratic convention in Milwaukee next July, where the Democratic nominee will be selected! Tom needs supporters like you to represent him — 📲 Make sure to follow Tom on , , and . It’s a great way to stay on top of all things Tom 2020 (and so is the Sunday Update, of course!). Thanks for being a part of this team! Any questions? Drop us a note: mailto:info@tomsteyer.com. Have a fantastic Sunday, Tony P.S. To see cool pics from TeamTom, follow on Twitter, with special content curated by yours truly! Tony Choi Creative Writer Tom 2020 | [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]() We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about this movement. If you'd like to learn more about volunteering for Tom's campaign, . If you'd like to stay up to date with Tom on the road, make sure to follow him on , , and . name: Team Warren
subject: Every investment of $3, or $10, or $26 means that we can build a country that works for everybody
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This next election will be the biggest in our lifetime. Knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting community events, and talking with voters about our vision for big, structural change is how... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4a0/45c30650/118207bc0/66f6ce2e/2366305286/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
We want to talk about what it means when you _invest_ in this campaign.

Billionaires invest in politics all the time. They invest huge amounts into candidates that promise them special favors after Election Day.

But investing in this campaign means something special. When you pitch in $2 to help this movement continue to grow, you join hundreds of thousands of other grassroots donors who want to see big, structural change for our country.

And those investments, every $3, or $10, or $26 contribution, mean we can build a country that works not for the rich and powerful at the top, but for everybody -- you and your family, your neighbors in Cresco, and everybody who's been left out and left behind by Washington.

**[And right now, your investment is powerfully important. Can you chip in $2 for the first time to invest in this movement and grow this grassroots movement for big, structural change?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b4a0/45c30650/118207bc0/66f6ce12/2366305286/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDFJRl9FR1JfR1JNX1RfMjAxOTExMjRfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML1IF_EGR_GRM_T_20191124_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

This next election will be the biggest in our lifetime.

Knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting community events, and talking with voters about our vision for big, structural change is how we'll win in 2020. Your investment now helps make that possible.

Team — We’re trying to get on the Republican primary ballot in all 50 states and we need your help. Some state parties are going to extreme lengths to make it difficult for anyone to challenge Trump.
For example: The Republican Party of Florida has decided that in order for a candidate to appear on the presidential primary ballot, **they must pay $25,000 to the state party.**
If you ask me, $25,000 is outrageous, but if we’re going to get on the ballot everywhere, then we need to make sure we’ve got the money.That’s why I’m asking you to make a contribution to our Ballot Access Fund. I am absolutely committed to making sure voters in every state have a real choice in next year's primary, and I am counting on supporters like you to help me do just that.****
[**Can you rush a donation today to help us make it happen?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rZ2znL2uXm7lPaNDFA45szg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191124_fr_s&n=5)
| [CHIP IN:
BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rZ2znL2uXm7lPaNDFA45szg&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191124_fr_s&n=6)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191124_fr_s&n=7).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191124_fr_s&n=8) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191124_fr_s&n=9).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bret=20Richards?=
subject: 🛑 Ending Illegal Immigration
body:
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489

https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pMh16nCa_hA&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
This week I focused on the issue that I hear most on the campaign trail: immigration. Career politicians use immigration as a wedge-issue for re-election, but never do anything about it. In Congress, I will take the lead to combat illegal immigration.
https://www.facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
https://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
https://www.instagram.com/bretrichards4congress/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AKFcqll_hko&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
Hello

As I travel across the Fourth District, constituents tell me immigration is one of their top concerns. Every Iowan that I talk with is concerned about illegal immigration, because to us it's about respecting the rule of law. People understand that the immigration system is broken, and that Congress has needed to fix it for 40-50 years. However, that doesn’t change the fact that we MUST follow the rule of law. The rule book is important to us as Americans – under it, we are all treated equally.

One of the most memorable moments of the campaign is when I spoke at an event with an Angel Mom. Michelle Root was the keynote speaker for that event. I woke up very early on the day of the speech and thought to myself, what can I say to Michelle
—the rest of the audience in my mind didn’t matter. The government completely failed her daughter, Sarah. Hours after Sarah had graduated from Bellevue University with a 4.0 grade-point-average, she was killed by 19 year-old Eswin Mejia. Mejia, an illegal alien, had a blood alcohol content of over three times the legal limit. Mejia could have been deported many times in previous years before that tragic night, but the system failed over and over. Omaha Police weren't able to get ICE to apprehend him. The system failed Sarah and Michelle again when the judge allowed Mejia to be released on a small bond. He disappeared and has never been heard from again.

The night of the speech, I met Michelle for the first time. What an amazing person. She tells Sarah’s story to help us all see how incompetent our government has become. I know I could never be that strong. I would never want to talk about that tragic night again if it were my son or daughter. Michelle is so strong, she tells Sarah’s story over and over to try to fix the system that failed her daughter.

Please watch and listen to Sarah’s story in this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V-QG-V8Ro6w&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489

Politicians keep on using immigration as a talking-point for raising money and re-election but rarely make policy that stops illegal immigration or the trafficking of drugs and human lives across our borders. In order to maintain the integrity and the safety of our nation we must secure our borders.

When elected to Congress, I intend to protect our nation's borders by:
* Supporting the construction of a wall on our nation's southern border
* Reforming our immigration laws
* Prosecuting those individuals who come to the U.S. illegally
* Passing laws that deny bail to any illegal immigrant who commits a felony
* Advocating for the mandatory use of systems, such as E-Verify, to ensure businesses can't hire illegal immigrants.

On another subject, last week I announced some exciting news: Country singer Trey Taylor, who opened for President Donald Trump during his 2016 campaign, will be headlining a one-night-only evening of entertainment for our campaign. I'm grateful for the support and confidence Trey has placed in our movement. Read on to find out more about this special performance!
TICKETS AVAILABLE HERE (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489)
I can't fight to defend the citizens of our country without your support. Please considering donating $5, $15 or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=8e3dfc098a&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) to our campaign, as well as help spread my message throughout your community. Your generous donation can be made here. (https://richardsforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae8e7c784d8480fbbe3b24d82&id=33d224693d&e=10eff4eed0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489)

Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com (mailto:bret@richardsforcongress.com) or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you.

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
More On Immigration
Promoting Our Message
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5YHL5um2Sv0&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
Check out our latest video highlighting how Iowa neighbors solve problems better than career politicians!
Upcoming Events
Country star Trey Taylor is hosting an EXCLUSIVE evening of entertainment for our supporters in Sioux City on December 13th. Get your tickets here (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) today!
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/country-star-trey-taylor-concert-with-congressional-candidate-bret-richards-tickets-79743977383?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
Building Our Network
Another week connecting with local Republicans at the Emmet County GOP in Estherville, Sac County GOP in Sac City, Floyd County GOP in Charles City, and Story County GOP in Ames. Story County held a wonderful chili supper on Sunday that my campaign team thoroughly enjoyed.

Always appreciate spending time with members of ABATE this time in District 2
—
a great group of patriotic Iowans dedicated to promoting freedom and liberty.

Recent Coverage

https://richardsforcongress.com/a-qa-with-gop-congressional-candidate-bret-richards/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489

https://thegraphic-advocate.com/content/special-guest?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
“When you get down to it, the people in rural America hold the conscience of our country. You’re there for your neighbors, whether it’s good times or bad. I believe sending somebody like that is going to change DC.”
Up Next

Next week, I'll be meeting with grassroots conservatives at the Osceola and Kossuth County central committee meetings. I also look forward to spending time with my family during the holiday and giving thanks for the blessings in my life.

Get Involved

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5xPeOhUV0U&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=0a0693f1ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_14_02_32&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-0a0693f1ab-52099673&utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489
BARN SIGNS ARE AVAILABLE NOW! INFO@RICHARDSFORCONGRESS.COM (http://info@richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) TO GET YOURS TODAY!

We can't let this election be determined by Washington or Des Moines insiders. Send your neighbor to Congress instead! Even if you're unable to donate (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) we still need your help.

Want to serve as a county co-chair? Know others who might want to join our team? Send an email to volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com (mailto:volunteers@RichardsForCongress.com) to lend a hand.
Be sure to like us on Facebook (http://facebook.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) and follow us on Twitter (http://twitter.com/Richards4Iowa?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) and Instagram (http://instagram.com/BretRichards4Congress?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=c713c0d5ab-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_20_04_11&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-c713c0d5ab-25822489) to stay up to date!

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: She's the antidote to Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cba0/6cd27893/52f14b0f/158799c5/4099985904/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Until we abolish the Electoral College (yes, please!), we're going to spend a lot of time talking about "swing states". And one of the most critical swing states is New Hampshire. In 2016, Hillary Clinton beat Donald Trump by just 2736 votes. So, you better believe that we're all going to be fighting over New Hampshire in 2020. **With all those millions pouring in, we have to make sure that Democratic Senator Jeanne Shaheen is defended.** [**Donate $3 today and let's make sure we've got Senator Shaheen's back.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cba0/6cd27893/52f14b0f/158799c2/4099985904/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-shaheen?refcode=2019-11-24-shaheen&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Jeanne is a great public servant and _exactly_ what we need right now in Washington D.C. She's the antidote to Mitch McConnell's politics-as-usual. Climate chaos? She's fighting it. Trump's cruel immigration policies? She's taking them on. The NRA and their stranglehold on gun violence prevention? She's standing up to them. We need Jeanne Shaheen in the Senate. And we need to have her back as Trump and McConnell look to defeat her. [**Donate today and help build her grassroots power in New Hampshire. clean_body: | "" | | Until we abolish the Electoral College (yes, please!), we're going to spend a lot of time talking about "swing states". And one of the most critical swing states is New Hampshire. In 2016, Hillary Clinton beat Donald Trump by just 2736 votes. So, you better believe that we're all going to be fighting over New Hampshire in 2020. With all those millions pouring in, we have to make sure that Democratic Senator Jeanne Shaheen is defended. "" Jeanne is a great public servant and exactly what we need right now in Washington D.C. She's the antidote to Mitch McConnell's politics-as-usual. Climate chaos? She's fighting it. Trump's cruel immigration policies? She's taking them on. The NRA and their stranglehold on gun violence prevention? She's standing up to them. We need Jeanne Shaheen in the Senate.
